typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchivePath as string (),
	destination_error_rows as integer (),
	ErrorLogPath as string (),
	ErrorLogPathFileName as string (),
	FileFound as boolean (),
	From_email as string (),
	FullArchivePathFileName as string (),
	FullSourcePathFileName as string (),
	MyFileValue as string (),
	SMTP as string (),
	SourcePath as string (),
	source_error_rows as integer (),
	To_email as string ()
}

source(output(
		Effective_Date as double,
		Loan_Account_Number as double,
		FairValue as decimal(19,19),
		DateOfValue as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TypeOfValue as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> ExcelSource
ExcelSource derive({Copy of Effective_Date} = toDecimal(Effective_Date,30,10)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(input(
		Effective_Date as double,
		FairValue as double,
		Loan_Account_Number as double,
		DateOfValue as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TypeOfValue as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Effective_Date = {Copy of Effective_Date},
		FairValue,
		Loan_Account_Number,
		DateOfValue,
		TypeOfValue)) ~> OLEDBDestination
